name: zindex_archive_add_file_record
description: zIndexArchive::AddFileRecord appends payload bytes, records file offset/size/name, grows capacity, increments record count, and marks the archive dirty.
known_limits: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?AddFileRecord@zIndexArchive@@QAEHPBDPBXI0PBUzZarFileTime@@@Z at 0x4a64d0 still fails: 202 unmasked mismatches, 24 relocation bytes masked, 14 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, BN size 241 bytes, VC object symbol size 288 bytes.
The native smoke exercises AddFileRecord through zUtil_ZAR::WriteSectionBlob and verifies payload bytes, record capacity/count, dirty flag, record path, file offset, and file size.
